# P4 Standards

## 1. Review Version Flow

Report versions follow the workflow below:

draft_v1
→ draft_v2
→ final_v1

Rules:

* draft_v1: initial draft generated by workflow
* draft_v2: revised draft after pharmacist feedback
* final_v1: pharmacist-approved final version
* Only one final_v1 can exist per ticket

---

## 2. Audit Log Required Fields

Every workflow step and API execution must be recorded.

Required fields:

* ticket_id
* step_name
* duration_ms
* timestamp

Optional fields:

* input_json
* output_json

---

## 3. Standard Error Response Format

All API errors should follow the same structure.

```json
{
  "error_code": "TICKET_NOT_FOUND",
  "message": "Ticket not found",
  "detail": {}
}
```

---

## 4. Error Codes

| Code                  | Description                  |
| --------------------- | ---------------------------- |
| REVIEW_NOT_FOUND      | Review payload not found     |
| TICKET_NOT_FOUND      | Ticket not found             |
| REPORT_NOT_FOUND      | Report version not found     |
| INVALID_REVIEW_TYPE   | Invalid review type          |
| APPROVAL_REQUIRED     | Pharmacist approval required |
| INVALID_VERSION_TAG   | Invalid report version       |
| INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR | Internal server error        |
